zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell於1492年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾多德斯維爾時，她的父親John Mauncell20歲，母親Sarah Isabel Wingfield20歲。她和Richard Rogers至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1556年享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mauncell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Dowdeswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Doswell
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): variant of Dowdeswell, a habitational name from Dowdeswell in Gloucestershire, possibly named from an Old English personal name Dogod + Old English wella ‘spring, stream’.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell was born in 1492, in Dowdeswell, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Mauncell, was 20 and her mother, Sarah Isabel Wingfield, was 20. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Richard Rogers. She died in 1556, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell est née en 1492, à Dowdeswell, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mauncell, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sarah Isabel Wingfield, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Richard Rogers. Elle est décédée en 1556, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell 1492 in Dowdeswell, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Mauncell 20 und ihre Mutter Sarah Isabel Wingfield 20. Sie hatte mit Richard Rogers mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1556 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell è nata il nel 1492 nel Dowdeswell, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Mauncell, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Sarah Isabel Wingfield, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Richard Rogers. Morì nel 1556, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell(이)가 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 다우데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mauncell(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Isabel Wingfield(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Richard Rogers(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 64세의 나이로 사망했다.
